title: Mu'awiya I becomes Umayyad Caliph
fact: Mu'awiya I was the founder and first caliph of the Umayyad Caliphate, ruling from 661 until his death.

title: Yazid I becomes Umayyad Caliph
fact: Yazid ibn Mu'awiya ibn Abi Sufyan, commonly known as Yazid I, was the second caliph of the Umayyad Caliphate, ruling from April 680 until his death in November 683.

title: Abd al-Malik ibn Marwan becomes Umayyad Caliph
fact: Abd al-Malik ibn Marwan ibn al-Hakam, was the fifth Umayyad caliph, ruling from April 685 until his death in October 705.

title: Umar II becomes Umayyad Caliph
fact: Umar ibn Abd al-Aziz ibn Marwan was the eighth Umayyad caliph, ruling from 717 until his death in 720.

title: Al-Walid I becomes Umayyad Caliph
fact: Al-Walid ibn Abd al-Malik ibn Marwan, commonly known as al-Walid I, was the sixth Umayyad caliph, ruling from October 705 until his death in 715.

title: Marwan II becomes Umayyad Caliph
fact: Marwan ibn Muhammad ibn Marwan, commonly known as Marwan II and surnamed al-Himar, was the fourteenth and last caliph of the Umayyad Caliphate, ruling from 744 until his death.

title: Sulayman ibn Abd al-Malik becomes Umayyad Caliph
fact: Sulayman ibn Abd al-Malik ibn Marwan was the seventh Umayyad caliph, ruling from 715 until his death.

title: Hisham ibn Abd al-Malik becomes Umayyad Caliph
fact: Hisham ibn Abd al-Malik ibn Marwan was the tenth Umayyad caliph, ruling from 724 until his death in 743.

title: Yazid II becomes Umayyad Caliph
fact: Yazid ibn Abd al-Malik ibn Marwan, commonly known as Yazid II, was the ninth Umayyad caliph, ruling from 720 until his death in 724.

title: Al-Walid II becomes Umayyad Caliph
fact: Al-Walid ibn Yazid ibn Abd al-Malik, commonly known as al-Walid II, was the eleventh Umayyad caliph, ruling from 743 until his assassination in 744.

title: Yazid III becomes Umayyad Caliph
fact: Yazid ibn al-Walid ibn Abd al-Malik, commonly known as Yazid III, was the twelfth Umayyad caliph, ruling from 744 until his death months later.

title: Ibrahim ibn al-Walid becomes Umayyad Caliph
fact: Ibrahim ibn al-Walid ibn Abd al-Malik was an Umayyad caliph, and a son of Caliph al-Walid I.
